_publications._publicationTitle: Genetic modifiers of neurofibromatosis type 1-associated café-au-lait macule count identified using multi-platform analysis.

_contextSnippet: We used LCLs as the source of tissue for our expression studies. As a proxy, LCLs are easy to obtain and culture, but there is limited overlap in blood expression profiles and other tissues
details: Limited overlap in blood expression profiles compared to other tissues, acknowledged as a limitation for expression studies
